title: mentha aquatica var. arguta
intro: Mentha aquatica var. arguta, commonly known as water mint, is a variety of the water mint plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating digestive issues and relieving symptoms of colds and flu. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica var. arguta include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps and headaches. Herbal preparations of water mint include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, calm the mind, and promote overall well-being.
